headlines.headline: Frelol Software faces regulatory review of precision manufacturing practices

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews introduce significant operational uncertainty and potential legal or compliance costs that weigh on investor sentiment.

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% margin improvement directly enhances profitability and demonstrates improved operational efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
